warmup.activity: Power words: incredible, essential, transform, achieve, powerful

sentences: Exercise is essential for a healthy life.
speakingPrompt: Give a persuasive speech convincing someone to start exercising regularly.
fluencyDrill: Deliver the speech with passion and conviction

warmup.activity: Investment words: potential, growth, risk, return, portfolio

speakingPrompt: Present a technology you think is worth investing in and explain why.
fluencyDrill: Pitch the investment as a TV business analyst

warmup.activity: Health words: access, affordable, coverage, insurance, treatment

sentences: Healthcare should be accessible to all.
speakingPrompt: Discuss your country's healthcare system - strengths, weaknesses, and improvements.
fluencyDrill: Present a healthcare reform proposal

warmup.activity: Crypto words: blockchain, decentralized, mining, wallet, token

speakingPrompt: Explain cryptocurrency to a beginner - what it is, how it works, pros and cons.
fluencyDrill: Simplify complex concepts using analogies

warmup.activity: Climate words: emissions, warming, extreme, sustainable, carbon

speakingPrompt: Discuss the impact of climate change and what individuals can do about it.
fluencyDrill: Deliver an urgent call-to-action speech

warmup.activity: Culture words: respect, borrow, honor, exploit, sensitivity

fluencyDrill: Present multiple perspectives on a controversial cultural example

warmup.activity: Political words: democracy, election, parliament, legislation, vote

speakingPrompt: Explain your country's political system to an international visitor.

warmup.activity: Work words: freelance, contract, flexibility, security, platform

warmup.activity: Transport words: electric, autonomous, sustainable, infrastructure, mobility

warmup.activity: Decision words: turning point, consequence, risk, opportunity, leap
